prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a female cosplayer at a crowded anime convention hall. She has long teal hair, heterochromia, one blue and one amber eyes, and wears deer antlers and a small purple crown with a yellow rose clip. Her outfit is a teal two-piece idol costume with ruffled skirt, gold trim, wave patterns, gem choker, black fingerless gloves, and fishnet tights. She poses with a peace sign and one hand on her hip against a blurred background of convention attendees and bokeh lighting.
